summary.objective: Summarize login feature test execution and release readiness.
summary.overall_status: Execution found one High severity authentication failure and one blocked email scenario.
key_findings: Invalid password was accepted after prior successful session.
Forgot password scenario was blocked by staging SMTP outage.
report_gaps: TC0003 has no screenshot evidence because the mail service was unavailable.

open_risks: Authentication bypass risk remains open until TC0002 is fixed and retested.
mitigations: Block release until invalid-password defect is fixed and retested.

issues.title: Login accepts invalid password after prior session
issues.summary: Invalid password login resulted in dashboard access after a prior successful session.
issues.expected_result: Generic invalid credential message is shown and user remains on login page.
reproduction_steps: Log in with a valid user.
Enter the same username with an invalid password.

severity_normalization.reason: High severity because a major authentication flow accepts invalid credentials with limited workaround.

report_gaps: TC0003 blocker issue lacks screenshot evidence.

sit_document.objective: Assess SIT readiness for login release.
sit_document.execution_summary: Three of four selected cases were executed. One passed, one failed, one was blocked, and one remained untested.
sit_document.coverage_summary: Coverage is partial with a critical coverage gap for logout session clearing.
sit_document.defect_summary: One High authentication defect and one blocked SMTP-dependent scenario remain open.
known_limitations: SMTP outage blocked forgot password validation.
sit_document.conclusion: SIT should not sign off until the High defect is fixed and critical gap is retested.

uat_document.objective: Summarize UAT readiness for login release.
uat_document.execution_summary: UAT readiness is blocked by a High authentication defect.
uat_document.defect_summary: One High defect requires fix before UAT sign-off.
known_limitations: Forgot password could not be validated due to environment outage.
open_risks: Invalid credential handling may allow unauthorized access.
uat_document.conclusion: UAT should wait for fix and retest.

signoff_recommendation.reason: A High authentication defect and critical coverage gap remain open.

changelog.change: Initial report state generated from manual execution result.
